# SimpleWebApp .NET 9 Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net9.0 using the All-at-Once strategy. The project has no external NuGet dependencies. Modernizations include: minimal hosting model, nullable reference types, implicit usings, and C# 12 primary constructors.

**Progress**: 5/5 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-upgrade-project-file: Update project file to net9.0
- ✅ 02-modernize-hosting-model: Migrate to minimal hosting model
- ✅ 03-fix-nullable-types: Fix nullable reference type issues
- ✅ 04-apply-modern-csharp: Apply C# 12 primary constructors
- ✅ 05-build-and-validate: Build and validate
